#  Raising Capital is Hard. We Make it Easier.
Expert capital raising advisory for pre-seed to Series A startups raising $500K-$6.0M. From investment readiness assessment to investor introductions, we've helped 200+ companies raise over $270M+. 
[ Take the Assessment ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/take-the-assessment.html) [ Learn More ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html)

##  Capital Formation Services for Seed & Series A Startups 
From investment readiness assessment to live investor pitches, we guide you through every step of successful fundraising. Our proven "Understand, Advise, Execute" process has helped 200+ companies raise capital. 
###  Capital Formation Advisory Services 
Comprehensive support through your entire fundraising journey. From pitch deck refinement to investor introductions, we guide you every step of the way. 
[ Learn More ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html)
###  Investment Readiness Assessment 
Take our proprietary 10-minute assessment to evaluate your startup on five key components of capital readiness. Receive a personalized Investment Readiness Score and detailed report. 
[ Take Assessment ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/take-the-assessment.html)
###  Guided Capital Formation Journey 
We don't just advise—we walk beside you every step of the way. From initial assessment through term sheet signature, our team provides hands-on guidance, investor meeting preparation, and strategic support to ensure you secure the right capital on the right terms. 
[ Learn More ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html)
##  Why Founders Choose Tailwind Capital? 
We're not just consultants—we're former entrepreneurs and investors who have lived the challenges you're facing. 
###  Been There, Done That 
We have been in your shoes many times before – raised millions in seed and Series financing rounds for our own companies, multiple exits through IPO and acquisition and as investors know both sides of the table. 
###  Active Network 
Direct access to High and Ultra High Net worth investors who invest their own money – perfect for early-stage companies. Great connections with VC's, accelerators, Seed Funds so the introductions are warm. 
###  Hands-On Support 
Personal guidance through pitch refinement, practice sessions, and live investor introductions. We work alongside you, not just give you a platform. 
##  Proven Capital Formation Process 
Our three-phase "Understand, Advise, Execute" methodology ensures you approach investors with confidence and clarity. 
  * Understand
  * Advise
  * Execute


1 
###  Understand 
We dive deep into your business to understand your strengths, weaknesses, and unique value proposition. 
Deep dive into company details 
Get to know leadership team 
Calculate Investment Readiness Score 
Secure data room review 
2 
###  Advise 
We identify critical issues and develop a strategic action plan to address weaknesses before approaching investors. 
Identify mitigation priorities 
Develop strategic action plan 
Provide strategic recommendations 
Map unique capital path 
3 
### Execute
We execute your capital formation plan with precision, securing the right amount from the right investors. 
Execute capital formation plan 
Right amount, right structure 
Connect with right investors 
Position for optimal meetings 
##  What Founders Say About Tailwind 
What Founders say about us. 
> "Tailwind Capital's blend of real-world investment and startup experience was invaluable. They understood both sides of the table and helped us craft a pitch that resonated with investors. We wouldn't have closed our seed round without them." 
Cami Nelson
Beehive Labs
> "In addition to making introductions to their network, they have provided unique insights gathered from personal experiences that have helped us navigate the world of capital formation. They assisted us in building a compelling investor focused presentation and gave us valuable feedback. Additionally, they provided unique insights that we used to help settle on a starting valuation and set realistic capital formation goals for a company at our stage." 
Advent Therapeutics
> "I wish I had found them sooner. It would have saved us months of frustration. Their ability to help us tell a clear and concise story about what our company does and why made all the difference." 
Vigilant AI
> "Using the advice provided by the Tailwind Team we were able to reconnect with some of our existing investors, provide them with an updated deck that led to additional investment when we had been unsuccessful before…" 
Dock IQ
